da.data_controller:
Dataansvarlig: Hot Yoga Copenhagen ApS · CVR: 41295252
Torvegade 66, 1400 København K, Danmark
info@yogabible.dk · +45 53 88 12 09
da.s1_text: Information der kan identificere dig direkte eller indirekte, herunder navn, e-mail, telefon, IP-adresse, købshistorik, klassefremmøde og genkendelige fotos/videoer.
da.s2_text: Gælder for alle Yoga Bible brands, når Hot Yoga Copenhagen ApS fungerer som dataansvarlig. Tredjepartsansvarlige vil modtage separat meddelelse.
da.s3_contact: Kontakt & Konto: Navn, e-mail, telefon, adresse, loginoplysninger
da.s3_health: Sundhedsoplysninger: Indsamles kun når frivilligt delt til sikre undervisningsmodifikationer.
da.s4_admin: Administration (bookinger, fremmøde, support) — Kontrakt + Legitim interesse
da.s4_payment: Betaling, fakturering, bogføring — Kontrakt + Juridisk forpligtelse
da.s4_consent_note: Marketingsamtykke kan trækkes tilbage til enhver tid.
da.s5_text: Foto/video/lyd kan optages under undervisning og events. Deltagere kan anmode om kamerafri placering (24+ timers varsel foretrukket). Fuld udelukkelse i gruppeaktiviteter kan ikke altid garanteres.
da.s7_text: Nogle leverandører opererer uden for EU/EØS. Lovlige overførselsgrundlag og supplerende sikkerhedsforanstaltninger (standardkontraktbestemmelser) implementeres.
da.s8_education: Uddannelsesadministration: Varighed nødvendig for administration og certificeringsdokumentation
da.s9_erasure: Sletning (hvor ingen juridisk forpligtelse til opbevaring)
da.s9_objection: Indsigelse mod behandling baseret på legitim interesse
da.s11_text: Tekniske og organisatoriske sikkerhedsforanstaltninger: adgangskontrol, need-to-know begrænsninger, systemopdateringer.
da.s12_text:
E-mail: info@yogabible.dk · Telefon: +45 53 88 12 09
Klager: Først intern løsning; ret til klage hos Datatilsynet.
Politikken opdateres efter behov; seneste version altid på websitet.

en.data_controller:
Data Controller: Hot Yoga Copenhagen ApS · CVR: 41295252
Torvegade 66, 1400 København K, Denmark
info@yogabible.dk · +45 53 88 12 09
en.s1_text: Information that can identify you directly or indirectly, including name, email, phone, IP address, purchase history, class attendance, and recognizable photos/videos.
en.s2_text: Applies to all Yoga Bible brands when Hot Yoga Copenhagen ApS acts as data controller. Third-party controllers will receive separate notice.
en.s3_contact: Contact & Account: Name, email, phone, address, login credentials
en.s3_purchase: Purchase & Payment: Purchase history, invoices, payment status, installment plans
en.s3_attendance: Attendance & Training: Class sign-ups, attendance, workshop participation, certification status
en.s3_communication: Communication: Emails, messages, form submissions, customer service
en.s3_media: Photo/Video/Audio: Class recordings, event footage, Namaste Online streams
en.s3_technical: Technical Data: IP address, device/browser info, session data, cookies
en.s3_health: Health Information: Only collected when voluntarily shared for safe teaching modifications.
en.s4_service: Service delivery (classes, courses, YTT, mentorship) — Contract
en.s4_admin: Administration (bookings, attendance, support) — Contract + Legitimate interest
en.s4_payment: Payment, invoicing, accounting — Contract + Legal obligation
en.s4_consent_note: Marketing consent can be withdrawn at any time.
en.s5_text: Photo/video/audio may be recorded during classes and events. Participants can request camera-free placement (24+ hours notice preferred). Full exclusion in group activities cannot always be guaranteed.
en.s7_text: Some vendors operate outside the EU/EEA. Lawful transfer mechanisms and supplementary safeguards (Standard Contractual Clauses) are implemented.
en.s8_accounting: Accounting/Invoicing: ~5 years from end of fiscal year
en.s8_education: Training Administration: Duration necessary for administration and certification documentation
en.s8_support: Customer Service: 12–24 months depending on case type
en.s9_erasure: Erasure (where no legal obligation to retain)
en.s9_objection: Objection to processing based on legitimate interest
en.s10_consent: Statistics and marketing cookies require consent.
en.s11_text: Technical and organizational security measures: access control, need-to-know restrictions, system updates.
en.s12_text:
Email: info@yogabible.dk · Phone: +45 53 88 12 09
Complaints: Internal resolution first; right to complain to the Danish Data Protection Agency (Datatilsynet).
This policy is updated as needed; the latest version is always available on the website.
